description: Build QuantDrive frontend - complete Next.js app with file browser (grid+list), breadcrumbs, upload area, file preview, sharing dialog, search, storage bar, starred/recent/trash views
steps: Update apps/quantdrive/package.json: add next, react, react-dom, @tanstack/react-query to dependencies. Add @types/react, @types/react-dom, autoprefixer, postcss, tailwindcss to devDependencies. Update scripts to: dev='next dev --port 3006', build='next build', start='next start', typecheck='tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json'
Replace apps/quantdrive/tsconfig.json with Next.js-compatible config (pattern from quantmail/tsconfig.json)
Create apps/quantdrive/next.config.mjs: transpilePackages=['@quant/shared-ui','@quant/common'], output='standalone'
Create apps/quantdrive/tailwind.config.ts (same pattern)
Create apps/quantdrive/postcss.config.mjs (same pattern)
Create apps/quantdrive/src/app/globals.css
Create apps/quantdrive/src/app/layout.tsx with Inter font, metadata title='QuantDrive', QueryProvider
Create apps/quantdrive/src/app/error.tsx
Create apps/quantdrive/src/app/loading.tsx
Create apps/quantdrive/src/providers/query-provider.tsx
Create apps/quantdrive/src/hooks/useFiles.ts - useQuery hook for fetching files/folders in a path
Create apps/quantdrive/src/hooks/useStorageQuota.ts - useQuery hook for storage usage
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/FileBrowser.tsx - main file listing with grid/list view toggle
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/FileCard.tsx - file item card (grid view) with icon, name, size, modified date
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/FolderCard.tsx - folder item card with icon and name
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/Breadcrumbs.tsx - breadcrumb navigation showing current path
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/UploadArea.tsx - upload button + drag-and-drop zone using FileUpload from shared-ui
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/FilePreview.tsx - side panel showing file details, preview placeholder, metadata
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/ShareDialog.tsx - Dialog for sharing files/folders with permissions
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/StorageBar.tsx - progress bar showing used/total storage
Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/SearchResults.tsx - search results view

Create apps/quantdrive/src/app/page.tsx - main page with AppShell, sidebar (My Files, Starred, Recent, Shared, Trash), StorageBar in sidebar footer, main area with Breadcrumbs + FileBrowser + UploadArea
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck passes including @quant/quantdrive typecheck task
pnpm build passes including @quant/quantdrive next build
No inline mock data - useQuery hooks only
